mapper.insert:
SELECT USER_CONSENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USER_CONSENT ( consent_id, user_id, consent_level, purpose_tags, consent_given, is_active, created_at, expired_at ) VALUES ( #{consentId}, #{userId}, #{consentLevel}, #{purposeTags}, #{consentGiven}, 'Y', SYSTIMESTAMP, #{expiredAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT consent_id AS consentId, user_id AS userId, consent_level AS consentLevel, purpose_tags AS purposeTags, consent_given AS consentGiven, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, expired_at AS expiredAt FROM USER_CONSENT WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 'Y' AND (expired_at IS NULL OR expired_at > SYSDATE) ORDER BY created_at DESC
